## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] CI/Build update

## Validation

- [ ] Ran `npm run lint`
- [ ] Ran `npx tsc --noEmit`
- [ ] Ran `npm run build`
- [ ] Tested affected pages/endpoints locally

## Visual Changes

- [ ] No UI changes
- [ ] UI changed and screenshots were added

## Checklist

- [ ] I read CONTRIBUTING.md
- [ ] I updated docs when needed
- [ ] I did not commit secrets or environment files
